'''Republic City'''<ref name="TFANovel">[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Awakens'' novelization]]</ref> was a [[City|megalopolis]] and the [[capital]] of [[Hosnian Prime]].<ref name="Bloodline" /> It was the seat of power of the [[New Republic]], as the [[planet]] served as the duly-elected capital of the [[New Republic Senate]] during the [[Cold War|conflict]] between the [[First Order]] and the [[Resistance]].<ref name="TFA VD">''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> Republic City was [[Hosnian Cataclysm|destroyed]] with the rest of the planet when the First Order turned its [[superweapon]], [[Starkiller Base]], towards Hosnian Prime in an effort to eliminate the Republic from [[the galaxy]].<ref name="Episode VII" />

{{City-stub}}
